title: SV: $info severity wrongly printed as "Assertion failed"
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.
> $info is printed/reported as "Assertion failed" (this is misleading). 

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

```verilog
`timescale 1ns/1ns
module m;
  initial begin
    #10;
    $info ("Info print");
  end
endmodule : m
```
LOG:
```log
[10] -Info: test.sv:5: Assertion failed in TOP.m: Info print
```
May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

> Yes please, I believe this is easy one for a starter like myself :-)
